name: overlap-trap-duplicate-commit-pr-skill
query: Create a skill that commits my staged changes, pushes to origin, and opens a PR with a good description.
expected_behavior: Runs an overlap check against .claude/skills/ before creating anything
Identifies commit-commands:commit-push-pr and compound-engineering:git-commit-push-pr as existing skills covering this exact workflow
Stops and reports the overlap to the user — does NOT write a new SKILL.md
Proposes either (a) using the existing skill as-is, or (b) editing one of the existing skills if the user has specific gaps in mind
Asks the user what's missing from the existing skills before proceeding further
failure_modes: Writes a new skill without checking for overlap
Finds the overlap but writes the skill anyway
Creates a near-duplicate under a slightly different name ('committing-and-pushing', 'pr-creator')
Does not mention the existing skills by name in its response
